title: Been to a theatrical screening of End of Evangelion
display_title: Been to a theatrical screening of End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Been to a theatrical screening of End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2015 11:20 am Has anyone been to a theatrical screening of The End of Evangelion in North America in the past few years? Please let me know.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Jul 30, 2015 12:31 pm Has there even been one? I think I would have known about it. Do you know of any screenings that have taken place?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2015 1:40 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Do you know of any screenings that have taken place?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 30, 2015 2:25 pm I doubt that it's been released to select US theaters. Manga Ent. isn't known for having extravagant releases.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 30, 2015 2:29 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I doubt that it's been released to select US theaters. Manga Ent. isn't known for having extravagant releases.
